mapper.select: SELECT code_group, code_field, code_before, code_after, code_description FROM code_description WHERE code_group = #{codeGroup} AND code_field = #{codeField} ORDER BY code_before
SELECT code_group, code_field, code_before, code_after, code_description FROM code_description WHERE code_group = #{codeGroup} ORDER BY code_field
SELECT code_group, code_field, code_before, code_after, code_description FROM code_description ORDER BY code_group, code_field, code_before
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO policy_change_case_sequence (sequence_date, current_serial) VALUES (#{sequenceDate}, LAST_INSERT_ID(1)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_serial = LAST_INSERT_ID(current_serial + 1)
mapper.select: SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
SELECT change_item FROM policy_change_case_reservation_item WHERE change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} ORDER BY change_item
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO policy_change_case_reservation ( change_case_no, policy_no, policy_seq, reserved_by, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{changeCaseNo}, #{policyNo}, #{policySeq}, #{reservedBy}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT change_case_no, policy_no, policy_seq, reserved_by, expires_at, consumed_at, created_at FROM policy_change_case_reservation WHERE change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} FOR UPDATE

SELECT a.policy_no, a.policy_seq, a.change_case_no, a.acceptance_status, COALESCE(status_cd.code_description, a.acceptance_status) AS acceptance_status_description, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_by, a.updated_at, a.reviewed_by, a.reviewed_at, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT i.change_item ORDER BY i.change_item SEPARATOR ',') AS change_items, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(cd.code_description, i.change_item) ORDER BY i.change_item SEPARATOR ',') AS change_item_descriptions FROM policy_change_acceptance a LEFT JOIN code_description status_cd ON status_cd.code_group = 'policy-change-acceptance' AND status_cd.code_field = 'acceptance_status' AND status_cd.code_before = a.acceptance_status LEFT JOIN policy_change_item i ON i.policy_no = a.policy_no AND i.policy_seq = a.policy_seq AND i.change_case_no = a.change_case_no LEFT JOIN code_description cd ON cd.code_group = 'policy-change-item' AND cd.code_field = 'change_item' AND cd.code_before = i.change_item WHERE a.policy_no = #{policyNo} GROUP BY a.policy_no, a.policy_seq, a.change_case_no, a.acceptance_status, status_cd.code_description, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_by, a.updated_at, a.reviewed_by, a.reviewed_at ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.policy_no, a.policy_seq, a.change_case_no, a.acceptance_status, COALESCE(status_cd.code_description, a.acceptance_status) AS acceptance_status_description, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_by, a.updated_at, a.reviewed_by, a.reviewed_at, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT i.change_item ORDER BY i.change_item SEPARATOR ',') AS change_items, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(cd.code_description, i.change_item) ORDER BY i.change_item SEPARATOR ',') AS change_item_descriptions FROM policy_change_acceptance a LEFT JOIN code_description status_cd ON status_cd.code_group = 'policy-change-acceptance' AND status_cd.code_field = 'acceptance_status' AND status_cd.code_before = a.acceptance_status LEFT JOIN policy_change_item i ON i.policy_no = a.policy_no AND i.policy_seq = a.policy_seq AND i.change_case_no = a.change_case_no LEFT JOIN code_description cd ON cd.code_group = 'policy-change-item' AND cd.code_field = 'change_item' AND cd.code_before = i.change_item WHERE a.policy_no = #{policyNo} AND a.policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND a.change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} GROUP BY a.policy_no, a.policy_seq, a.change_case_no, a.acceptance_status, status_cd.code_description, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_by, a.updated_at, a.reviewed_by, a.reviewed_at

SELECT a.policy_no, a.policy_seq, a.change_case_no, a.acceptance_status, COALESCE(status_cd.code_description, a.acceptance_status) AS acceptance_status_description, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_by, a.updated_at, a.reviewed_by, a.reviewed_at, i.change_item AS change_items, COALESCE(item_cd.code_description, i.change_item) AS change_item_descriptions FROM policy_change_acceptance a JOIN policy_change_item i ON i.policy_no = a.policy_no AND i.policy_seq = a.policy_seq AND i.change_case_no = a.change_case_no LEFT JOIN code_description status_cd ON status_cd.code_group = 'policy-change-acceptance' AND status_cd.code_field = 'acceptance_status' AND status_cd.code_before = a.acceptance_status LEFT JOIN code_description item_cd ON item_cd.code_group = 'policy-change-item' AND item_cd.code_field = 'change_item' AND item_cd.code_before = i.change_item WHERE a.policy_no = #{policyNo} AND a.policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND i.change_item = #{changeItem} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.change_case_no DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, acceptance_status, created_by, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at, updated_by FROM policy_change_acceptance WHERE policy_no = #{policyNo} AND policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_file, change_key, content_before, content_after, created_at, updated_at FROM policy_change_file WHERE policy_no = #{policyNo} AND policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} AND change_item = #{changeItem} ORDER BY change_key, id

SELECT id, policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_field, change_key, content_before, content_after, created_at, updated_at FROM policy_change_field WHERE policy_no = #{policyNo} AND policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} AND change_item = #{changeItem} ORDER BY id

SELECT id, policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_file, change_key, content_before, content_after, created_at, updated_at FROM policy_change_file WHERE policy_no = #{policyNo} AND policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} ORDER BY change_item, change_file, change_key, id

SELECT id, policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_field, change_key, content_before, content_after, created_at, updated_at FROM policy_change_field WHERE policy_no = #{policyNo} AND policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} ORDER BY change_item, change_key, change_field, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO policy_change_acceptance ( policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, acceptance_status, created_by ) VALUES (#{policyNo}, #{policySeq}, #{changeCaseNo}, #{acceptanceStatus}, #{createdBy})
INSERT INTO policy_change_item (policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item) VALUES (#{policyNo}, #{policySeq}, #{changeCaseNo}, #{changeItem})

INSERT INTO policy_change_field ( policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_field, change_key, content_before, content_after ) VALUES ( #{policyNo}, #{policySeq}, #{changeCaseNo}, #{changeItem}, #{changeField}, #{changeKey}, #{contentBefore}, #{contentAfter} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content_before = VALUES(content_before), content_after = VALUES(content_after), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO policy_change_file ( policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_file, change_key, content_before, content_after ) VALUES ( #{policyNo}, #{policySeq}, #{changeCaseNo}, #{changeItem}, #{changeFile}, #{changeKey}, #{contentBefore}, #{contentAfter} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content_before = VALUES(content_before), content_after = VALUES(content_after), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
